files.content:
{
  "format": "LS_GIZMO_V1",
  "name": "lambdascript",
  "description": "Development gizmo for the LambdaScript compiler, interchange model, forks tooling, and gizmo tooling.",
  "gadgets": {
    "core": {
      "root": ".",
      "language": "mixed",
      "target_ref": "origin/gadgets/lambdascript/core/main",
      "integration_branch": "gadgets/lambdascript/core/main",
      "agent_branch_template": "gadget-agents/lambdascript/core/{agent}",
      "owned_paths": [
        "glc/",
        "examples/",
        "docs/core/",
        "docs/forks/",
        "scripts/forks/",
        "tools/gizmo/",
        "tools/forks-ts/",
        "native/forks-core/",
        "forks/",
        "forks.bat",
        "install.bat",
        "verify.bat",
        "ed-land-json.bat",
        "edd-land-json.bat",
        "eddy-land-json.bat",
        "guy-land-json.bat",
        "ed-sync-all.bat",
        "edd-sync-all.bat",
        "eddy-sync-all.bat",
        "guy-sync-all.bat"
      ],
      "verification_profiles": {
        "quick": [
          "python -m py_compile scripts/forks/forks.py scripts/forks/forks_dispatch.py scripts/forks/submission_object.py scripts/forks/import_json_patch.py scripts/forks/land_json_patch.py scripts/forks/gadget_branches.py scripts/forks/gadget_land_json.py scripts/forks/gadget_verify_profiles.py scripts/forks/gadget_promote.py scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py scripts/forks/agent_land_json.py scripts/forks/main_history.py scripts/forks/replay_plan.py scripts/forks/replay_sync.py scripts/forks/accelerator.py scripts/forks/amalgamate_all.py"
        ],
        "gizmo": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install --only tools/gizmo",
          "cd tools/gizmo && npm run build",
          "cd tools/gizmo && npm test"
        ],
        "glc-light": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install --only glc",
          "cd glc && npm test"
        ],
        "forks-ts": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install --only tools/forks-ts",
          "cd tools/forks-ts && npm run build",
          "cd tools/forks-ts && npm test"
        ],
        "full": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install",
          "verify.bat"
        ]
      },
      "commands": {
        "forks": "forks.bat {args}",
        "glc": "cd glc && npm run glc -- {args}",
        "gizmo": "cd tools/gizmo && node dist/src/cli.js {args}",
        "forks-ts": "cd tools/forks-ts && node dist/src/cli.js {args}",
        "accelerator": "forks.bat accelerator {args}"
      }
    },
    "wavproc": {
      "root": "tools/wavproc",
      "language": "mixed",
      "target_ref": "origin/gadgets/lambdascript/wavproc/main",
      "integration_branch": "gadgets/lambdascript/wavproc/main",
      "agent_branch_template": "gadget-agents/lambdascript/wavproc/{agent}",
      "owned_paths": [
        "tools/wavproc/",
        "docs/wavproc/"
      ],
      "verification_profiles": {
        "quick": [
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal build"
        ],
        "full": [
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal build",
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal run wavproc -- --help"
        ]
      },
      "commands": {
        "wavproc": "cd tools/wavproc && cabal run wavproc -- {args}"
      }
    }
  },
  "imports": {}
}

payload.summary: Registers the Haskell-only wavproc package as a lambdascript gizmo gadget. This must land to lambdascript/core before running gadget-init for lambdascript/wavproc and before landing the wavproc package files.
payload.title: Register wavproc gadget in lambdascript gizmo
